'''Clan R'lyek''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] clan on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] that had a multi-generational feud with [[Clan Doneeta]]. The feud finally ended in [[3986 BBY]] with a truce negotiated with [[Tott Doneeta]], resulting in the two clan leaders going out to [[Death/Legends|die]] in the [[Bright Lands]], then being replaced with younger leaders who would be more willing to support the peace.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 2]]
